contentBlocks.original:
अहं वैश्वानरो भूत्वा प्राणिनां देहमाश्रितः
प्राणापान समायुक्तः पचाम्यन्नं चतुर्विधम्
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ahaṃ vaiśvānaro bhūtvā prāṇināṃ dehamāśritaḥ
prāṇāpāna samāyuktaḥ pacāmyannaṃ caturvidham
contentBlocks.translation: I, having become the universal fire, residing in the bodies of living beings, and united with the inward and outward breaths, digest the four kinds of food (which is chewed, swallowed, licked and sucked).
contentBlocks.meanings: अहम् (aham) – I; वैश्वानरः (vaiśvānaraḥ) – universal fire; भूत्वा (bhūtvā) – having become; प्राणिनाम् (prāṇinām) – of living beings; देहम् (deham) – body; आश्रितः (āśritaḥ) – residing; प्राणापान (prāṇāpāna) – inward and outward breaths (prāṇa:inward breath | apāna:outward breath); समायुक्तः (samāyuktaḥ) – united with; पचामि (pacāmi) – I digest; अन्नम् (annam) – food; चतुर्विधम् (caturvidham) – four kinds (catur:four | vidham:kinds);
